dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.refreshError: Threads token refresh FAILED — see runbook: re-run OAuth before expiry
dashboard.automationHint: Check/uncheck automatic generation per category x format, then press Save. Unchecked combinations are skipped during short/article/report runs.
dashboard.generateHint: Press "① Collect" to gather the latest items, then "② Generate". Short auto-publishes to each channel; article/report create a draft (approve on the Drafts page). Watch progress in "Recent job runs" below.

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.autoDeleteNote: Drafts left unapproved are auto-deleted after 30 days.
drafts.confirmPublish: Publish this post to the selected channels?

research.title: Research reports
research.hint: Deep-dive research reports (the report format). Launch a run, watch it collect evidence and verify claims, then approve the three-language draft.
research.launchHint: Leave the theme blank to auto-select from recent items.
research.themePlaceholder: e.g. AI regulation across the EU, US and Japan

sources.title: Sources
sources.collectHint: Test sources by running the collect job and checking the run result on the dashboard.

prompts.title: Prompt templates
prompts.focusKeywordsHint: Keywords to emphasise for this category x format. Prioritised in both collection (web search) and article generation — other major news is still picked up. Blank = no change. Lets you steer focus without touching the system prompt.
prompts.placeholders: Placeholders: '{items}' '{category}' '{date}' '{language}' '{keywords}' (+short: '{x_language}' '{threads_language}' '{notion_language}'; +article: '{theme}' '{outline}'). Focus keywords are appended automatically, so '{keywords}' is optional.

channels.title: Channel matrix
channels.hint: Language and on/off per category x format x channel. Short posts publish automatically; article/report go through draft approval.

settings.title: Settings
settings.shortRequireApproval: Require approval for short posts too (safety valve)
settings.xAllowUrlOnShort: Allow URLs in short X posts ($0.20/post instead of $0.015)
